evals.prompt: Move the IKEA deal from contract-negotiating to signed.
expect: deal-stage-advance runs and checks for signed_contract_date in evidence
transition_allowed: false when signed_contract_date is absent
no stage change occurs without the required evidence

evals.prompt: Mark the HomeGoods deal as signed.
expect: account-health runs to check exclusivity conflicts
exclusivity_conflicts appears in the output if overlapping categories
FTC disclosure check fires for sponsored/gifted content

evals.prompt: Move the IKEA deal to contract-negotiating.
expect: contract review trigger fires at the contract-negotiating stage
